reason: Successfully verified that the agent can open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, retrieve the page title "Example Domain", and report the results in the chat interface.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with agent list in sidebar
Clicked on agent "QA-20260424-234207-f1ar" in the main content area - Agent view opened successfully with chat interface
Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working"
Waited 5 seconds for agent to process the request - Agent completed processing after 8 seconds total

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly states: "The page title is "Example Domain"." Agent also showed three completed browser operations: Open Browser, Browser Command (get title), and Close Browser
